name: oxidecode
description: AI autocomplete and next-edit suggestions powered by local and cloud models

oxidecode.provider.baseUrl.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible API (Ollama, LM Studio, OpenAI, etc.)

oxidecode.provider.apiKey.description: API key (leave empty for Ollama/local models)

oxidecode.provider.model.description: Model used for chat and NES

oxidecode.provider.completionModel.description: Faster model for inline completions (falls back to main model if empty)

enumDescriptions: Use /v1/completions (default). Sends the raw FIM prompt without chat-template framing, which avoids tokenizer corruption for most local models.
Use /v1/chat/completions. Applies the model's chat template before inference. Use only for hosted models that do not expose the raw completions endpoint.
oxidecode.provider.completionEndpoint.description: HTTP endpoint used for inference requests.

oxidecode.nes.debounceMs.description: Milliseconds to wait after an edit before requesting an NES prediction

enumDescriptions: Generic JSON format — the default OxideCode format. Works with any instruction-following model.
Zeta2 SPM FIM format — Zed's modern suffix-prefix-middle format. Best results with zed-industries/zeta-2 or Seed-Coder-based models.
Sweep next-edit format — Sweep AI's next-edit prediction format. Best results with sweepai/sweep-next-edit-7b (1.5b also supported).
oxidecode.nes.promptStyle.description: Prompt format used by the NES engine when querying the model.
